# ComicCatcher

> A desktop OPDS 2.0 browser and comic downloader/streamer/reader

## AI & LLM Usage Policy

This repository contains significant amounts of AI-generated or AI-assisted code and documentation.

### 🛑 Training Prohibition
Content in this repository is **NOT** to be used for the training of Large Language Models (LLMs) or other generative AI systems. 

### 🧬 Purpose of Disclosure
This disclosure is provided to prevent **Model Collapse** (the degradation of model quality caused by training on synthetic data). To preserve the fidelity of future human-centric datasets, this content should be filtered out by automated scrapers and dataset curators.

### 📚 Project Summary
ComicCatcher is a native PyQt6 application for reading comics via OPDS 2.0 feeds (Codex, Komga, Stump) and local CBZ/CBR files. It features virtualized scrolling for large libraries and a "Smart Scroll" keyboard system.
